_publications._publicationTitle: Spatial Gene-Expression Profiling Unveils Immuno-oncogenic Programs of NF1-Associated Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor Progression.

_contextSnippet: We treated human MPNST cell lines (ST88–14, JH-2–002)...with pharmacologic inhibitors of BIRC5 (Survivin), YM155 and LQZ-7I, and observed a significant reduction in cell viability
details: Significant reduction in cell viability when treated with BIRC5 inhibitors YM155 and LQZ-7I
